# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

---
apiVersion: "authentication.k8s.io/v1"
kind: "AuthorizationPolicy"
metadata:
  name: "default-authz"
spec:
  action:
    type: "allow"
  match:
    sources:
      - kind: Namespace
        name: default-authorization # Namespaces to check for the presence of
        # authorization policy rules.
    methods:
      - kind: Method
        name: GET
        uriPattern:
          prefix: /
  rules:
    - action:
        type: "allow"
---
apiVersion: k8s.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Destination
metadata:
  namespace: default-authorization # Namespace to deploy the destination rules for.
  name: authz.default-authorization.svc
spec:
  host:
    port: 9080
status: {}
